title: Unify doc nav drawer and persist rail state

source.subject: fix(docs): unify doc nav drawer and persist rail state across navigation

body:
Book and platform-spec share one off-canvas drawer pattern; rail collapse state persists in `localStorage` across in-site navigations.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`278da1b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/278da1b)
- **Subject:** fix(docs): unify doc nav drawer and persist rail state across navigation
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`

## Relation
Lands in the v0.3 cutoff window (`f57377a`→`aaddd32`) under workstream `stabilization`.
